message:
chore(bench): update benchmark baselines with p95/p99 percentiles

Regenerate baselines/baseline_latest.json with current performance data
from the phase0_baseline benchmark suite. Key improvements:

- Add p95_ns and p99_ns percentile fields to all benchmark entries for
  tail latency visibility (previously only had mean/median/std_dev)
- Capture ~1100 additional benchmark cases (cancel_dispatch, cancel_ready
  mixed, work_stealing, global_injector, three_lane patterns) not present
  in the previous baseline
- Notable improvements from recent optimization work:
  - arena/get_hit: 0.99ns → 0.64ns (35% faster)
  - arena/insert_remove_cycle: 6.44ns → 2.88ns (55% faster)
  - budget/combine: 10.08ns → 4.75ns (53% faster)
- Save dated snapshot as baselines/baseline_20260214_145954.json for
  historical tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
